Author: brendanwelsh
Name: D100H Mirror
Description: Mirror the D100H dial + keys to the on-screen viewer (over a localhost WebSocket) while Ulanzi Studio runs, and replay each control's real function (hotkey / media / volume / text).

Actions.Name: Dial (mirror + replay)
Actions.Tooltip: Bind to the D100H knob: mirrors rotate/press to the viewer and replays volume / media / hotkey.

Actions.Name: Key (mirror + replay)
Actions.Tooltip: Bind to any D100H key: lights the matching key on the viewer and replays a hotkey / media key / volume / text.
